# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring


parameters:
  appName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mywebapp
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: East US
  adminPassword:
    type: secureString

variables:
  appServicePlanName: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-plan')]"
  sqlServerName: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-sql')]"
  storageAccountName: "[concat(parameters('appName'), 'storage')]"
  sqlDatabaseName: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-db')]"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
    sku:
      name: S1
      tier: Standard
      size: S1
      capacity: 1
    perSiteScaling: false
    elasticScaleEnabled: false
    maximumElasticWorkerCount: 1
    microsoftPartnerProgramEnabled: false
    isSpot: false
    spotExpirationTime: "1900-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    isSpotEnabled: false
    isSpotEligible: false
    isLinux: false
    isXenon: false
    hyperV: false
    targetWorkerCount: 0
    targetWorkerSizeId: 0
    resourceGroup: "[resourceGroup().name]"
    kind: "app"

- type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[parameters('appName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
  properties:
    name: "[parameters('appName')]"
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
    httpsOnly: true
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
        - name: "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION"
          value: "18"
        - name: "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY"
          value: ""
        - name: "ApplicationInsightsAgent_EXTENSION_VERSION"
          value: "~3"
    clientAffinityEnabled: false
    clientCertEnabled: false
    clientCertMode: "Required"
    hostNamesDisabled: false
    http20Enabled: true
    httpsOnly: true
    identity:
      type: "SystemAssigned"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "[variables('sqlServerName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: "sqladmin"
    administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    version: "12.0"
    publicNetworkAccess: "Enabled"
    minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
    administrators:
      administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
      login: "sqladmin"
      sid: "[subscription().principalId]"
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
  properties:
    collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
    maxLogSizeBytes: 1073741824
    maxSizeBytes: 268435456000
    edition: "Standard"
    serviceObjectiveName: "S0"
    zoneRedundant: false
    requestedServiceObjectiveName: "S0"
    autoPauseDelay: 30
    isAutoPauseEnabled: true
    readReplicaCount: 0
    readScale: "Disabled"
    backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
    createMode: "Default"
    sourceDatabaseId: ""
    restorePointInTime: ""
    recoveryServicesRecoveryPointId: ""
    targetDatabaseId: ""
    targetDatabaseName: ""
    operationMode: "Default"
    sampleName: ""
    elasticPoolName: ""
    status: "Online"
    databaseName: "[variables('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    serverName: "[variables('sqlServerName')]"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
  name: "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  sku:
    name: "Standard_LRS"
    tier: "Standard"
  kind: "StorageV2"
  properties:
    accessTier: "Hot"
    allowBlobPublicAccess: false
    allowCrossTenantReplication: false
    allowSharedKeyAccess: true
    defaultToOAuthAuthentication: false
    encryption:
      keySource: "Microsoft.Storage"
      services:
        blob:
          enabled: true
          keyType: "Account"
        file:
          enabled: true
          keyType: "Account"
    isHnsEnabled: false
    isNfsV3Enabled: false
    isLocalUserEnabled: false
    isVersioningEnabled: false
    largeFileSharesState: "Disabled"
    minimumTlsVersion: "TLS1_2"
    publicNetworkAccess: "Enabled"
    supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    networkAcls:
      defaultAction: "Deny"
      bypass: "AzureServices"
      virtualNetworkRules: []
      ipRules: []

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
  apiVersion: "2020-11-01-preview"
  name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAllWindowsAzureIps')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
  properties:
    startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
    endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

- type: Microsoft.Web/sites/config
  apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '/web')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
  properties:
    appSettings:
      - name: "WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION"
        value: "18"
      - name: "DB_CONNECTION_STRING"
        value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', variables('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=sqladmin;Password=', parameters('adminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
      - name: "STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING"
        value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', variables('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
    connectionStrings: []
    defaultDocuments:
      - "Default.htm"
      - "Default.html"
      - "Default.asp"
      - "index.htm"
      - "index.html"
      - "iisstart.htm"
      - "default.aspx"
      - "hostingstart.html"
    netFrameworkVersion: "v4.0"
    phpVersion: "8.0"
    pythonVersion: ""
    nodeVersion: "18"
    linuxFxVersion: ""
    windowsFxVersion: ""
    http20Enabled: true
    httpLoggingEnabled: false
    detailedErrorLoggingEnabled: false
    publishProfile:
      name: "[parameters('appName')]"
      value: ""
    remoteDebuggingEnabled: false
    remoteDebuggingVersion: ""
    use32BitWorkerProcess: true
    webSocketsEnabled: false
    alwaysOn: false
    javaVersion: ""
    javaContainer: ""
    javaContainerVersion: ""
    appCommandLine: ""
    managedPipelineMode: "Integrated"
    virtualApplications:
      - virtualPath: "/"
        physicalPath: "site\\wwwroot"
        preloadEnabled: false
    loadBalancing: "LeastRequests"
    experiments:
      rampUpRules: []
    autoHealEnabled: false
    autoHealRules:
      triggers:
        requests:
          count: 0
          timeInterval: "00:00:00"
        statusCodes:
          - status: 500
            count: 0
            timeInterval: "00:00:00"
        slowRequests:
          timeTaken: "00:00:00"
          count: 0
          timeInterval: "00:00:00"
      actions:
        actionType: "ScaleUp"
        customAction:
          exe: ""
          commandLine: ""
          script: ""
    tracingOptions: ""
    cors:
      allowedOrigins:
        - "*"
      supportCredentials: false
    push:
      enabled: false
    apiDefinition:
      url: ""
    autoSwapSlotName: ""
    localMySqlEnabled: false
    managedServiceIdentityId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')).identity.principalId]"
    slotSwapProfile:
      sourceSlotName: ""
      targetSlotName: ""
      preserveVstsSettings: false
    vnetRouteAllEnabled: false
    vnetRouteAllEnabled: false
    vnetRouteAllEnabled: false
